# Relay {-}
## Overview {-}
  RelayInitialize opens a connection to the NI switch hardware. If the initialization succeeds, the session handle is returned and the test_result flag is set to TRUE. Otherwise, an error message is stored in status_message.

## RelayInitialize
### Purpose
  Initialize the NI switch module and establish a VI session

### Retun Value
  Returns an integer status code.


## RelaySet
### Purpose

### Retun Value

## RelayClose
### Purpose

### Retun Value

## ReplayOpenAll
### Purpose

### Retun Value

## RelaySignalSet
### Purpose

### Retun Value

## SetNICDiscrete
### Purpose

### Retun Value

## SetNICDiscreteByData
### Purpose

### Retun Value

## SetProcDiscreteByData
### Purpose

### Retun Value
